name: Broccoli-Cheese Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam broccoli for 3 to 4 minutes. Rinse with cold water, drain, and set aside.
2. Combine cottage cheese and buttermilk in a blender on low speed. Pour the mixture into a bowl.
3. Add eggs, onion, and cheeses to the bowl. Stir until well combined.
4. Pour the mixture into a pie shell.
5. Arrange broccoli florets on top, pressing them down gently into the cheese mixture.
6. Sprinkle nutmeg over the top of the quiche.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees for 20 minutes.
8. Reduce the temperature to 350 degrees and bake an additional 10 to 15 minutes.
9. Let the quiche rest for 10 minutes before serving.
10. Serves 6.
